name: VTIL_PressISB
title: VTIL_PressISB
description: The VTIL_PressButton methods simulates pressing the ISOBUS Shortcut Button [ISB] of the Virtual Terminal and the releasing of it after the duration. As a result, the All Implements Stop Operations Switch State Message is sent with the value Stop implement operations until the ISB is released.
Every time the function is called the Number of transitions from Permit to Stop is incremented.

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function.
